Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sanctum]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Sanctum is a place that can fall to corruption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Sanctum is a location to which Suriel can banish her weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Sanctum is an important world.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Sanctum is the headquarters of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Sanctum requires jurisdictional overlaps between Judges to be well documented.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Sanctum is a place where Ozmanthus Arelius lived as a pacifist monk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Sanctum has powerful and ancient protections.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Sanctum contains a treasure vault of another world.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Sanctum is a central planet covered by one city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Razael's power was enough to crack Sanctum in half.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Sanctum is a location containing the Hall of Judgment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Sanctum is a world that Fury called Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The planet of Sanctum has oceans as blue as Cradle's and continents covered in silver and gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Sanctum is a planet located below the Grave.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Sanctum is a golden, planet-spanning city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Sanctum is a stable world with greater weight to its natural laws and defenses than other worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Sanctum is the central world located below The Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Sanctum is an Abidan-settled Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Grave floats above the world of Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Threshold is the first line of defense between Sanctum and would-be Vroshir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Sanctum is a location near the Iteration being visited.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Sanctum is the location of Phoenix Division headquarters.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
